# Daily Report — 2026-05-06

## Task Completed
Added `expire_asset_contract` tool to contract_tools.py. The tool transitions an
`alm_contract` record to the `expired` state via a targeted PATCH request, keeping the
operation semantically distinct from the general `update_asset_contract` tool. An optional
`notes` field is included in the request body when supplied. The function performs a 404
check before raising any HTTP error, returning a clear "not found" message. Registered in
`__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (system_administrator and full
packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 910
- All passing: yes
- New tests added: 10 (TestExpireAssetContract class in test_contract_tools.py)
- Coverage: contract_tools.py 99%

## Security
pip-audit flagged vulnerabilities in system-level packages only (pip 24.0, setuptools
68.1.2, wheel 0.42.0, pyjwt 2.7.0) — none are in project source code or project
dependencies. Pre-existing, unrelated to today's changes.

- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/contract_tools.py — added ExpireAssetContractParams model and expire_asset_contract function
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py — import and __all__ registration
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py — import and tool definition registration
- config/tool_packages.yaml — added to system_administrator and full packages
- tests/test_contract_tools.py — added TestExpireAssetContract (10 tests)
